name: should-trigger-on-file-formatter-agent
prompt: Build an agent that formats files on save
assertions: Skill correctly identifies that this should be a hook, not an agent
Prerequisite Check fires to redirect toward /create-hook
Output explains why an agent cannot handle file-format-on-save events

name: should-trigger-on-log-search-subagent
prompt: Create a subagent that searches logs for errors
assertions: Agent frontmatter validated (name, model, tools, maxTurns)

name: should-not-trigger-on-api-client-retry
prompt: Add retry logic to my API client
assertions: Request is routed to refactor or request-code-review skill instead
